## Summary

Describe the change and the branch it affects.

## Evidence Type

Choose one:

- [ ] calibration
- [ ] recovery
- [ ] heldout
- [ ] diagnostic

## Claim Boundary

- [ ] This PR does not claim COT solves turbulence, protein folding, vacuum energy, or any other branch.
- [ ] This PR does not claim L6/L7 promotion unless the promotion gate is explicitly documented.
- [ ] Any new claim includes data source, baseline, uncertainty/tolerance, and failure condition.

## Data and Provenance

- Dataset/source:
- Version/hash/DOI/link:
- Was this used for calibration or selection?
- Was this held out?

## Validation

- [ ] Baseline comparison included or declared missing.
- [ ] Wrong-form/mutation controls included or declared missing.
- [ ] Failure modes updated if applicable.
- [ ] Large raw data not committed.
